Steps22 

Final for best UI
++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -Eeuo pipefail
export AWS_PAGER=""

PROJECT_DIR="$HOME/opsai-assistant-aws"
ENV_FILE="$PROJECT_DIR/.env"
TEMP_DIR="$HOME/.opsai-step21-final"

echo "============================================================"
echo " Step 21 - Complete OpsAI Internal HR Portal and Final UI"
echo "============================================================"
echo
echo "This one file will:"
echo "  1. Remove and rebuild the HR Portal"
echo "  2. Add Candidate and Manager views"
echo "  3. Add 10 managers, 20 jobs, 40 candidates and applications"
echo "  4. Add the complete hiring-stage workflow"
echo "  5. Add local robot, AI, HR, infrastructure and approval images"
echo "  6. Apply the final visual theme"
echo "  7. Fix repeated icons and moving-data issues"
echo "  8. Validate and deploy everything to AWS Amplify"
echo

if [[ ! -d "$PROJECT_DIR" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: $PROJECT_DIR was not found."
  exit 1
fi

if [[ ! -f "$ENV_FILE" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: $ENV_FILE was not found."
  exit 1
fi

mkdir -p "$TEMP_DIR"
chmod 700 "$TEMP_DIR"

cleanup() {
  rm -rf "$TEMP_DIR"
}
trap cleanup EXIT


cat > "$TEMP_DIR/01_install_hr_portal.sh.b64" <<'01_INSTALL_HR_PORTAL_SH_EOF'

01_INSTALL_HR_PORTAL_SH_EOF

base64 --decode "$TEMP_DIR/01_install_hr_portal.sh.b64" > "$TEMP_DIR/01_install_hr_portal.sh"
chmod +x "$TEMP_DIR/01_install_hr_portal.sh"
rm -f "$TEMP_DIR/01_install_hr_portal.sh.b64"

cat > "$TEMP_DIR/02_upgrade_visual_ui.sh.b64" <<'02_UPGRADE_VISUAL_UI_SH_EOF'

02_UPGRADE_VISUAL_UI_SH_EOF

base64 --decode "$TEMP_DIR/02_upgrade_visual_ui.sh.b64" > "$TEMP_DIR/02_upgrade_visual_ui.sh"
chmod +x "$TEMP_DIR/02_upgrade_visual_ui.sh"
rm -f "$TEMP_DIR/02_upgrade_visual_ui.sh.b64"

cat > "$TEMP_DIR/03_fix_ui_stability.sh.b64" <<'03_FIX_UI_STABILITY_SH_EOF'

03_FIX_UI_STABILITY_SH_EOF

base64 --decode "$TEMP_DIR/03_fix_ui_stability.sh.b64" > "$TEMP_DIR/03_fix_ui_stability.sh"
chmod +x "$TEMP_DIR/03_fix_ui_stability.sh"
rm -f "$TEMP_DIR/03_fix_ui_stability.sh.b64"

echo
echo "------------------------------------------------------------"
echo "Phase 1 of 3: Rebuilding the complete Internal HR Portal"
echo "------------------------------------------------------------"
bash "$TEMP_DIR/01_install_hr_portal.sh"

echo
echo "------------------------------------------------------------"
echo "Phase 2 of 3: Adding the final visual UI and local images"
echo "------------------------------------------------------------"
bash "$TEMP_DIR/02_upgrade_visual_ui.sh"

echo
echo "------------------------------------------------------------"
echo "Phase 3 of 3: Applying the UI stability fix"
echo "------------------------------------------------------------"
bash "$TEMP_DIR/03_fix_ui_stability.sh"

echo
echo "------------------------------------------------------------"
echo "Final validation"
echo "------------------------------------------------------------"

cd "$PROJECT_DIR"

for file in \
  app/web/index.html \
  app/web/hr-portal.js \
  app/web/hr-portal.css \
  app/web/opsai-theme-final.js \
  app/web/opsai-theme-final.css \
  app/web/assets/opsai-robot.svg \
  app/web/assets/opsai-ai-orb.svg \
  app/web/assets/opsai-infrastructure.svg \
  app/web/assets/opsai-hr-team.svg \
  app/web/assets/opsai-approvals.svg
do
  if [[ ! -s "$file" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: Missing or empty file: $file"
    exit 1
  fi
done

node --check app/web/hr-portal.js
node --check app/web/opsai-theme-final.js

grep -q "Candidate View" app/web/hr-portal.js
grep -q "Manager View" app/web/hr-portal.js
grep -q "NEXT TECHNICAL ROUND" app/web/hr-portal.js
grep -q "CLIENT ROUND" app/web/hr-portal.js
grep -q "DOCUMENTS VERIFICATION" app/web/hr-portal.js
grep -q "OFFER RELEASE SOON" app/web/hr-portal.js
grep -q "OFFER RELEASED" app/web/hr-portal.js
grep -q "opsaiPromptEnhanced" app/web/opsai-theme-final.js
grep -q "opsaiHeadingEnhanced" app/web/opsai-theme-final.js
grep -q "observer.disconnect" app/web/opsai-theme-final.js

set -a
source "$ENV_FILE"
set +a

AWS_REGION="${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1}"
AMPLIFY_BRANCH_NAME="${AMPLIFY_BRANCH_NAME:-main}"

if [[ -z "${AMPLIFY_APP_ID:-}" ]]; then
  AMPLIFY_APP_ID="$(aws amplify list-apps \
    --region "$AWS_REGION" \
    --query "apps[?name=='opsai-assistant-ui'].appId | [0]" \
    --output text)"
fi

DEFAULT_DOMAIN="$(aws amplify get-app \
  --app-id "$AMPLIFY_APP_ID" \
  --region "$AWS_REGION" \
  --query 'app.defaultDomain' \
  --output text)"

FINAL_URL="https://${AMPLIFY_BRANCH_NAME}.${DEFAULT_DOMAIN}"

echo
echo "============================================================"
echo " Step 21 completed successfully"
echo "============================================================"
echo
echo "Final resources configured:"
echo "  Hiring managers:      10"
echo "  Job requisitions:     20"
echo "  Candidate profiles:   40"
echo "  Sample applications:  40"
echo "  Hiring stages:        17"
echo "  Local SVG images:      5"
echo
echo "Final URL:"
echo "  $FINAL_URL"
echo
echo "Open the URL in an Incognito window or press Ctrl + Shift + R."
echo
echo "Final sidebar:"
echo "  💬 New Chat"
echo "  🖥️ Infrastructure Assets"
echo "  ✅ Approvals"
echo "  👥 HR Portal"
echo
echo "HR Portal:"
echo "  Candidate View"
echo "  Manager View"
echo "  Requisition search"
echo "  Candidate skill search"
echo "  Complete manager hiring-stage actions"
echo


Upload the file

In CloudShell:

Actions
→ Upload file
→ fix_opsai_ui_moving_data.sh

Confirm:

cd ~

ls -lh ~/fix_opsai_ui_moving_data.sh
Step 2 — Run the fix
chmod +x ~/fix_opsai_ui_moving_data.sh

bash ~/fix_opsai_ui_moving_data.sh

Deployment status: SUCCEED

OpsAI moving-data and repeated-icon issue fixed.
